note: Created tests/no_memory_leak_create_use_free.rs with 5 tests verifying no memory leaks after create/use/free cycles: (1) handle_map_entry_removed - verifies device handle removed after each cycle, (2) arc_refcount_is_one_before_removal - verifies no dangling Arc references, (3) no_rss_growth_after_many_cycles - RSS stability over 100 cycles using /proc/self/statm, (4) concurrent_create_use_free_no_leak - 8 threads x 10 cycles with handle verification, (5) device_free_without_socket_close_no_leak - unclosed sockets don't leak handles. All 5 tests pass, full suite passes (0 failures).
